# vtm_log_export (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `appliance_only` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `files` (Set of String)
- `history` (String)
- `history_period` (Number)
- `metadata` (Block Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--metadata))
- `metadata_json` (String)
- `note` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
